name: Apricot Stuffed Chicken Breasts
recipeInstructions:
1. Filling:
- 2/3 cup apricots (chopped)
- 3 tablespoons chopped onion
- 2 tablespoons slivered almonds
- 1 tablespoon parsley
- 1/4 teaspoon salt
2. Sauce:
- 1 cup plain nonfat yogurt (warmed)
- 1/2 cup apricots (chopped)
- 1/4 cup dijon mustard
- 1 teaspoon sugar
3. Place the apricot mixture inside each piece of chicken; roll up and secure with toothpicks.
4. Bake in a 375°F oven for 30-40 minutes.
5. Remove from oven and spoon warmed apricot-yogurt sauce over each breast.
